title: rubus × pseudoidaeus f. asperata
intro: Rubus × pseudoidaeus f. asperata, also known as Himalayan Blackberry, is a hybrid species of the Rubus genus, characterized by its thorny canes and dark purple fruits. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Himalayan Blackberry include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Rubus × pseudoidaeus f. asperata include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to make jams, jellies, and other dietary supplements.
